name: golang-github-google-go-github-dev
title: golang-github-google-go-github-dev
summary: Go library for accessing the GitHub API
description:
Go library for accessing the GitHub API
go-github is a Go client library for accessing the GitHub API v3
(https://developer.github.com/v3/).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-google-go-github-dev because Go library for accessing the GitHub API.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-google-go-github-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-google-go-github-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
